summary: Completed frontend testing of Football Kickoff functionality in both Simple and Advanced modes. All kickoff features in Simple Football Mode are working correctly: Kickoff button (cyan) visible, 3-step workflow (yard line selection, kicker selection, result selection), all 5 result options (Touchback, Return, Fair Catch, Out of Bounds, Kick Return TD) working with correct ball placement and possession changes. Advanced Football Mode shows kickoff dialog at game start with 5-step workflow.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement needed

critical_code_review_comments: Consider adding DialogDescription to kickoff dialogs for better accessibility
seed_data_creation: Demo mode uses hardcoded team data - Central Wolves (home) and Riverside Panthers (away)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Football kickoff functionality fully tested in both Simple and Advanced modes. All kickoff rules implemented correctly: kick from 35 yard line (default), touchback at 25, out of bounds penalty at 40, fair catch and return with custom yard lines, kick return TD adds 6 points.
